pi_items.source: verifier.py checks for authentic SuiteCRM form entrypoint
task description requested fields ('First Name', 'Last Name', and 'Email Address') and verifier.py explicitly checks for these internal field names

privileged_info_summary: The task requires generating a synthetic SuiteCRM Web-to-Lead HTML form from scratch. Verified that the expected output file path is /home/ga/Documents/tradeshow_lead_form.html, the requested redirect URL is https://www.meridian-tech.com/digital-catalog, and the generated HTML must contain the SuiteCRM 'WebToLeadCapture' entrypoint and the internal field names for first name (first_name), last name (last_name), and email (email1) as defined in the task description and enforced by the verifier logic.
